THE COURT ORDERED AS FOLLOWS: (1) PURSUANT TO CRC 3.770(B), NO HEARING REGARDING PLAINTIFF'S MOTION IS REQUIRED; (2) PLAITIFF'S CLAIMS AGAINST BLUE SHIELD OF CALIFORNIA LIFE & HEALTH INSURANCE COMPANY ARE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE; AND (3) PURSUANT TO CRC 3.770(C), NO NOTICE TO CLASS MEMBERS IS REQUIRED BECAUSE THE PUTATIVE MEMBERS WILL NOT BE PREJUDICED BY THE LACK OF NOTICE. Order is signed.
